expectations.text: A new checkpoint commit was created on top of the initial skeleton commit.
The commit subject is a single substantive sentence (not 'Updates', 'wip', or empty).
expectations.evidence: Subject is 'Checkpoint 2026-04-08: sort list_widgets() newest-first, add colour filter module' — colon-separated tag + comma list, not a natural single sentence. Not retrievable by semantic grep the way a sentence would be.

expectations.text: CHECKPOINTS.md exists at the repo root and contains exactly one session entry matching the commit subject character-for-character.
expectations.evidence: CHECKPOINTS.md does not exist. No index was created.

expectations.text: The CHECKPOINTS.md entry is prefixed with today's date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
The commit body mentions the rejected functools.lru_cache alternative and explains the reasoning.
The commit body mentions the sorted()/generator dead end.
The commit body references specific file paths that were touched.
config.draft.yml was NOT added to the commit.
The commit body is substantive: more than 400 characters.
